title: Demo Topic: Testing the Daily Workflow
reminderTitle: This is a fictitious testing reminder
reminderBody: Today we are testing the daily topic workflow in the Aurora Community Demo. No action is required and no real contributor information should be used.
badExample: Using real project details, contributor names, or production links during a demo.
goodExample: Using fictional names, placeholder links, and clearly labeled demo content.
quickRule: Keep every demo message fictional and easy to identify.
